executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch. Critical configuration errors detected preventing workflow execution. All 3 build attempts failed due to GitHub Actions workflow file not being accessible or missing. HTTP 404 errors indicate workflow dispatch endpoint cannot locate the build.yml file at .github/workflows/build.yml path.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The build.yml workflow file is missing from the .github/workflows/ directory in the scib_demo repository on the main branch, or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/dispatch the workflow.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Empty Action URL in Build Logs
errors.description: All build failure logs contain empty action_url fields, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was successfully initiated. This prevents access to detailed build logs and error diagnostics.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty in build_failure_attempt-1.json, build_failure_attempt-2.json, and build_failure_attempt-3.json
errors.root_cause: Workflow dispatch failed before a run could be created, resulting in no action URL being generated. This is a direct consequence of the 404 error when attempting to dispatch the workflow.
errors.impact: Unable to retrieve detailed build logs from GitHub Actions API. Error analysis must rely solely on dispatch error messages. Prevents deep diagnostics of Maven/Gradle build failures.

errors.title: Repeated Build Attempts Without Resolution
errors.description: Three consecutive build attempts (attempt-1, attempt-2, attempt-3) all failed with identical 404 errors, indicating the underlying configuration issue was not resolved between attempts.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure (attempt 3 of 3)
errors.root_cause: Automated retry mechanism continued attempting builds without first verifying or correcting the workflow file existence. No remediation was applied between attempts.
errors.impact: Wasted build resources and time on repeated failures. Delayed identification of root cause. Indicates need for pre-flight checks before retry attempts.

errors.title: GitHub Token Permission Validation Failure
errors.description: The 404 error message suggests possible token permission issues. The GitHub token may lack 'workflow' or 'actions' scope required to dispatch workflows.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled
errors.root_cause: GitHub personal access token (PAT) or GitHub App token may not have been granted the 'workflow' permission scope, which is required to trigger workflow_dispatch events.
errors.impact: Even if workflow file exists, builds cannot be triggered programmatically. Requires token regeneration with correct scopes or GitHub App permission updates.

steps: 2. Create build.yml file with Maven/Gradle build configuration
3. Include workflow_dispatch trigger to enable manual/API triggering
4. Define build steps: checkout, setup-java, build with Maven/Gradle
5. Commit and push to main branch
6. Verify workflow appears in Actions tab on GitHub
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven build template
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file exists via GitHub API: GET /repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/contents/.github/workflows/build.yml

recommended_fixes.action: Verify and update GitHub token permissions
steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Locate the token used for automation (token redacted for security)
4. If missing, regenerate token with workflow scope
6. Test workflow dispatch with updated token
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Token validation script to check scopes via GitHub API: GET /user with Authorization header
recommended_fixes.validation: Successful workflow dispatch returns HTTP 204 No Content

recommended_fixes.action: Implement pre-flight validation before build retry
steps: 1. Add workflow file existence check before dispatch attempt
2. Validate GitHub token scopes before API calls
5. Log validation results for audit trail
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Pre-flight validation function to check workflow existence and token permissions
recommended_fixes.validation: Build retry only occurs after successful pre-flight checks

compliance_notes.audit_trail: All 3 build attempts logged with timestamps and error details in logs/ folder
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Configuration errors only.
compliance_notes.data_integrity: No data loss or corruption. Build artifacts not generated due to workflow failure.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build failure does not impact compliance as no code was deployed.

analysis_notes: Unable to fetch GitHub Actions workflow logs via API due to empty action_url. Analysis based on workflow dispatch error messages in logs/ folder. No Maven/Gradle build errors detected as build never executed. Root cause is missing workflow configuration file.
